commitsCreated.message: feat(upstream-sync): expand owned-files config based on historical validation
test(upstream-sync): validate classifier against pending upstream commits
fix(upstream-sync): skip merge commits in historical validation

configExpansions.reason: upstream commit 5eed863 introduces src/app/services/assets-public-path.directive.ts; conflicts with TAU's parametric build/asset machinery (prebuild.js, src/app/state/asset-base.generated.ts, src/app/services/auto-asset-src.directive.ts)

planDefects: Plan's historical-validation test included merge commits, which return zero files via `git show --name-only --pretty=format:` and always bucket as 'clean' regardless of semantic content. Fixed by adding --no-merges to git log; merge commits' actual diffs land via parent commits which are independently validated. Documented the rationale in the test's comment block.
notes: Validation revealed legitimate gap (services/state directories) and a plan defect (merge-commit handling). Both fixed; all 29 tests now pass. Three commits: a1e8a62 (config expansion), ba932fe (test file), d27cd50 (merge-filter fix).
